sales.title:
LUCANIA. Metapontum. Ca. 340-330 BC. AR stater (19mm, 7.87 gm, 11h). NGC Choice VF 5/5 - 5/5, Fine Style. Ap- and Ami-, magistrates. Head of Leucippus right, wearing Corinthian helmet pushed back on head; lion head right behind, AΠ monogram under chin / META, ear of barley with leaf to left; vertical club above leaf, AMI below leaf. HN Italy 1575. Johnston B2. Detailed Fine Style dies display a lush beard for Leucippus. HID05401242017 © 2025 Heritage Auctions | All Rights Reserved www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
Ancients

CILICIA. Soloi. AR Stater (10.85 gms), ca. 440-410 B.C. NGC Ch EF, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 4/5. Die Shift.
SNG Levante-37; SNG BN-124. Obverse: Amazon, wearing a pointed bonnet, with drapery around her waist and at least one breast bare, kneeling to left, holding her bow with both hands; at her waist, gorytos; in field to left and below, ivy leaf; behind her back to right, Corinthian helmet; Reverse: ΣΟΛΕΩΝ, large and plump bunch of grapes; to left, laurel branch; all within border of dots in an incuse square.


From the Peter Jones M.D. Collection (Greek Coin Art pg. 189; #2965).

Ex: Davissons E-Auction 36 (8/2020), Lot # 30 (with ticket).


To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click here.

sales.title:
The Coin Cabinet - Ancients Auction 28, Lot 43 — ANCIENT GREECE. CORINTHIA, CORINTH. 
Silver Stater, circa 345-307 BC. 
Obv: Pegasos flying left, Q below. Rev: head of Athena left, wearing Corinthian helmet; A-P flanking below, eagle standing behind
sales.description:
ANCIENT GREECE. CORINTHIA, CORINTH. 
Silver Stater, circa 345-307 BC. 
Obv: Pegasos flying left, Q below. Rev: head of Athena left, wearing Corinthian helmet; A-P flanking below, eagle standing behind left, head reverted.

Extremely Fine; splendid old cabinet tone with underlying lustre, previously graded NGC Ch XF (6290618-001).

Ex Classical Numismatic Group, Auction 127 (17/9/2024), lot 130. Ex Classical Numismatic Group, Triton XXVII (9/1/2024), lot 195. Ex Stack's Bowers, January 2022 NYI...
